title: Syren's Wail
description: This project adds the Syren's Wail from Sneaks Blueprint Project
body:
This mods the Syren's Wail to Minecraft.

This weapons has two abilities. 
Right clicking can send a super sonic blast. Use an Echo shard to repair / reload the shots.

Shift righclicking will reveal any and all entities around you.

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f1001737126472a47e03df6d7166fcc87aa4e3d.png)

[![Use Code SNEAK](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84bbfa52f61339ca16c130fd4727bf7358e6317a_0.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/SNEAK)

Mod Developed by [Ethrocky](https://www.youtube.com/@TheCosmoCrewLIVE)
Model Made by [Sneak](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCu9rm_6d8mGXg9N0R-dToTQ)

Check out the video where this weapon was created:
